Configuration.Properties: # Define the filename property this ./logs means it will create a logs folder in the root directory ./logs
Configuration.Appenders:
# Define the RollingFile appender that will write to a file the name is "file" which we need to pass to the logger to use this appender
# Define the layout for the RollingFile appender it's the same as the Console appender
%d{HH:mm:ss} [%t] %-5level %Logger{36} - %msg%n
# if file reaches this size it will create new file
# define the for the console appender
Configuration.Loggers:
# Define the root logger with appender Console, if we set additivity to false it will not use the parent (root) logger
# here we are using the console appender
#here w are using the file appender
# here we are using console appender
